docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,200.00 FILED BY MOLINA, JULIO AS TO DEFENDANT ABELA, CARLOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-02-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-13-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JULIO MOLINA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CARLOS ABELA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCES.
